perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with brown hair, wearing a white sweatshirt with a large blue flower, stands in an airport terminal with luggage carts in the background. She is surrounded by hands holding smartphones, simulating a press conference. (2) She repeatedly points to her cheek and smiles while 'answering' the off-camera questions with a specific recurring gesture. (3) The scene shifts slightly as she reacts to a shout from off-camera, waving her hand and laughing towards the lens.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Multiple voices speaking Mandarin simultaneously in an excited tone, mimicking reporters. (2) A female voice repeats a rhythmic phrase '我也不知道' (I don't know either) several times. (3) A loud, sharp male voice shouts a name, causing a surge in volume and energy, followed by upbeat electronic background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White subtitles translate the spoken Mandarin dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '我也不知道' (I don't know either) appears in large yellow font with a black outline for emphasis. (3) Decorative Text: '蔡宗翰來!!' (Cai Zonghan come!!) appears at the end in an energetic, variety-show style.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Mock-Interview -> Repetitive Gag -> High-energy Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character, and at least 3 other people represented by hands/arms holding phones in the periphery.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white sweatshirt featuring a large blue and yellow flower graphic.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor airport terminal area featuring stacks of blue luggage carts and glass partitions.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic parody of a celebrity press conference or a paparazzi encounter. The creator uses a recurring verbal and visual gag ('I also don't know') to avoid answering mock-serious questions, ending with a high-energy shout-out to another individual. The core intent is to entertain her audience through relatable situational humor and a well-known persona.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No clear products or services are featured for the purpose of promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature cheek-pointing gesture and rhythmic catchphrase repetition.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'short-form comedy' format popular on TikTok/Reels, utilizing on-screen text to punctuate the humor.
